metadata.title: Latest World Model Research, Papers, Projects, and Weekly Progress
metadata.description: Track the latest world model research in one bilingual entry point: curated papers, projects, milestone timelines, embodied AI, physical AI, and weekly progress.
metadata.keywords: latest world model research, world model papers, world model projects, world model weekly updates, embodied ai world models, physical ai research, world model timeline

home.title: Track world-model papers, systems, and weekly breakthroughs
home.description: A bilingual navigation site for the world-model ecosystem: core papers, projects, milestone timeline, and the latest research and industry progress.

updates.label: Latest updates
updates.description: Read weekly research and product signals in one stream.

timeline.label: Milestone timeline
timeline.description: Jump through major world-model releases and inflection points.

papers.label: Core papers
papers.description: Start with the canonical reading list and editorial briefs.

topics.label: Topic map
topics.description: Open the main branches from video to embodied world models.

signal_deck.title: Start with the highest-signal entry points
signal_deck.description: Use this layer as the fast scan: track the latest releases, jump into foundational papers, and branch into the world-model topics worth following next.

editor_picks.title: Editor picks
editor_picks.description: Use these three anchors to go deeper fast: one update, one paper, and one project that best represent what matters on the site right now.

search_paths.title: Search paths
search_paths.description: These hub pages target the main ways readers search for world-model information: latest papers, projects, physical-AI systems, and embodied AI research.

latest_papers.label: Latest world model papers
latest_papers.description: A recency-first reading list across the field.

projects.label: World model projects
projects.description: Platforms, demos, and products worth tracking.

physical_ai.label: Physical AI world models
physical_ai.description: A hub for robotics, embodied systems, and driving.

embodied_papers.label: Embodied AI papers
embodied_papers.description: Focused reading for embodied and robotics directions.

category.title: Best {name} Tools
category.description: Explore our curated collection of {name} tools and resources.
category.empty: No tools in this category yet.

affiliate.title: Affiliate Programs
affiliate.description: Discover high-paying affiliate programs for creators and marketers.

discount.title: Discount Deals
discount.description: Exclusive discount codes and deals for premium tools.

search.title: Search Tools & Products
search.description: Search our directory by name, description, or category.
search.search_placeholder: Search by name, tagline, or description...
search.results_count: {count, plural, =0 {Found 0 results} one {Found 1 result} other {Found # results}}
search.results_count_with_query: {count, plural, =0 {Found 0 results} one {Found 1 result} other {Found # results}} for "{query}"
search.empty_description: Try adjusting your search terms or clearing the filters.

explore.title: Explore All Tools
explore.description: Browse our directory and filter products by how they charge end users.
explore.empty_description: Try adjusting your filters to find more products.

item.authority_badge_desc: Showcase your credibility by adding our badge to your website.
item.featured_note_description: This tool is in the featured queue and receives stronger placement across directory listings.

submit.title: Submit Your Tool
submit.description: Showcase your tool to a community of active users and builders. Complete the submission in three steps.

auth_required.title: Sign in to submit your tool
auth_required.description: You can preview the submission flow first, but publishing a tool requires an account so we can link the submission and payment to you.

form.section_description: Provide accurate information so users can discover your tool quickly.
form.name: Tool Name
form.tagline_placeholder: The ultimate AI tool for developers
form.description_placeholder: Tell us more about your tool, its core features, and who it's for...
form.pricing_hint: This describes whether your product is free or paid for end users.
form.unexpected_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validation.categories_required: Please select at least one category.

payment.title: Choose Your Submission Promotion Plan
payment.description: This step only decides whether to buy faster review and featured placement. It does not change the tool pricing model you selected in step one.
payment.checkout_request_failed: Unable to start checkout. Please try again.
payment.checkout_url_missing: Payment link is unavailable. Please try again.

free.title: Standard Submission
free.description: Join the normal review queue and get listed in our directory

pro.title: Featured Submission
pro.description: Buy faster review and stronger placement
features: Featured placement across search results and listings
Exclusive featured badge on cards and detail pages
One-time permanent payment, no hidden fees
Permanent featured status without recurring subscription

messages.checkout_invalid_status: This tool cannot be submitted right now.
messages.checkout_creem_product_missing: Creem product is not configured for directory submission.
messages.checkout_in_progress: A checkout session is already in progress. Please complete it or try again shortly.

success.title: Submission Received
success.description: Your tool has been submitted successfully. We will review it and notify you after it goes live.
next_steps: Our curation team reviews the submission for quality and accuracy.
If approved, your tool will appear in relevant categories.
You will receive an email once the review is complete.

image_upload.file_too_large: Image size must be less than 2MB.
